title: Verify that the screen displays the correct header and promotional image
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Watchlist' page. | Verify that the header displays the 'Dove Channel' logo and the 'WATCHLIST' title. | Verify that the promotional image for 'The Real Deal' is displayed correctly.
expected_result: The header displays the 'Dove Channel' logo and the 'WATCHLIST' title. | The promotional image for 'The Real Deal' is displayed correctly.

title: Verify that the screen is empty when the watchlist is empty
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Watchlist' page. | Verify that the screen is blank, indicating that the watchlist is currently empty.
expected_result: The screen is blank, indicating that the watchlist is currently empty.

title: Verify that the screen displays the correct icons in the header
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Watchlist' page. | Verify that the header displays the correct icons: a profile icon, an information icon, and a search icon.
expected_result: The header displays the correct icons: a profile icon, an information icon, and a search icon.

title: Verify that the screen displays the correct status bar icons
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the 'Watchlist' page. | Verify that the status bar displays the correct icons: signal strength, battery, and time (7:57).
expected_result: The status bar displays the correct icons: signal strength, battery, and time (7:57).
